MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Vacated

Mtn For Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS UNITED FAMILY CARE CORPORATION, ROYAL COLONY VIEW PLACE, LLC, JOSEPH TABURAZA, JULIANA TABURAZA'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER

No appearances. This matter is to be heard at 9 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Mtn For An Order Modifying And Limiting Subpoenas
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dennis W. Rihn, appearing by Court Call for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Roldan Enriquez;
Cindy Truong, 415.881.7642, Wood Robbins, for the United Family Care Corporation.

Matter A R G U E D. Ruling: PLAINTIFF ROLDAN ENRIQUEZ' Motion For An Order Modifying And Limiting Subpoenas is GRANTED. No Sanctions are awarded. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Requinring Defts To Provide Supplemental Responses To Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dennis W. Rihn, appearing by Court Call for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Roldan Enriquez;
Cindy Truong, 415.881.7642, Wood Robbins, for the United Family Care Corporation.

Matter A R G U E D. Ruling: PLAINTIFF ROLDAN ENRIQUEZ' Motion For An Order Requiring Defendants To Provide Supplemental Responses To Special Interrogatories is GRANTED. United Family Care Corporation shall pay monetary sanctions to Plaintiff in the amount of $772.50 within 30 days. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported.

Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dennis W. Rihn, appearing by Court Call for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Roldan Enriquez;
Cindy Truong, 415.881.7642, Wood Robbins, for the United Family Care Corporation.

Matter A R G U E D. Ruling: Motion For A Protective Order is DENIED. United Family Care Corporation, Royal Colony View Place, LLC, Joseph Taburaza, Juliana Taburaza, and Wood Robbins LLC jointly and severally, shall pay Plaintiff monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,425.00 within 30 days. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order A) Requiring Defts To Provide Supplemental Responses
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dennis W. Rihn, appearing by Court Call for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Roldan Enriquez;
Cindy Truong, 415.881.7642, Wood Robbins, for the United Family Care Corporation.

Matter A R G U E D. Ruling: PLAINTIFF ROLDAN ENRIQUEZ' Motion For An Order Requiring Defendant To Provide Supplemental Responses is GRANTED. Royal Colony View Place, LLC shall pay monetary sanctions to Plaintiff in the amount of $772.50 within 30 days. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File X-Complaint By Defts
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs UNITED FAMILY CARE CORPORATION, JOSEPH TABURAZA & JULIANA TABURAZA's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint By Defendants is granted. The cross-complaint is compulsory and substantial evidence does not support the finding that this application was made in bad faith. Silver Organizations Ltd. v. Frank, (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 94, 98-99. (The Court will sign the proposed order that was emailed to the court.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
